## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content strategy, SEO efforts, and upcoming projects for HeyGen.](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marketing and L\&D article series to be repurposed into e-books within a week](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Focus on improving non-branded keyword traffic and click-through rates](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [Plans to localize website content, potentially in multiple languages](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [Prioritizing content creation for top 6 use cases to build extensive SEO suite](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)

## Topics

### E-book Creation from Existing Content

  - [88 marketing articles and 6 L\&D articles to be repurposed into e-books](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [Marketing e-book theme: "How to do more with less in marketing with AI videos"](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Mariana to complete e-book drafts within a week](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Marketing e-book prioritized for Anna's Feb 19th webinar with Tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)

### Use Case Content Strategy

  - [18 articles published covering 15 use cases, with 3 additional for corporate/product videos](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Shifting focus to top 6 use cases for extensive SEO coverage](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Team to develop 5 different angles per use case to maximize search visibility](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)

### SEO and Traffic Optimization

  - [Traffic impressions and clicks growing again after year-end dip](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [1M+ impressions since October, but only 26K clicks - opportunity to improve CTR](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
  - [Strategies discussed:](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
      - [Adding year (2025) to content titles](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
      - [Improving meta descriptions and alt text for images](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
      - [Auditing sitemap additions](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
      - [Focusing on non-branded keyword traffic](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)

### Content Localization Plans

  - [Considering multi-language localization, potentially starting end of February](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
  - [Initial test: 10 pages in 2-3 languages](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
  - [Mariana suggested automated tools (localize.js, Weglot) for efficient translation](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)

### Image Quality and Generation

  - [Addressing concerns about AI-generated image quality](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
  - [Plans to create a repository of 20 high-quality avatar images for content use](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Balancing generic stock photos with custom icons and avatars](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mariana to send e-book drafts and outlines within a week](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)
  - [Holly to send list of top 6 use cases for focused content creation](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [Stewart to clean up and send concise keyword list for non-branded traffic](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
  - [Nav to provide high-quality avatar images for content use](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Team to implement CTR improvement strategies (year in titles, meta descriptions, alt text)](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
  - [Await icons for tools pages to begin publishing](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [Develop plan to increase click-through rates on existing articles](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
  - [Prepare for website localization, potentially using automated tools](https://fathom.video/share/A9yZkq5sVi6ELGNoJK4f5DvspPuYeLLQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
